title: Untitled Game
description: Defend your command center from alien invaders in this tower defense survival game. Deploy and upgrade towers along a fixed path to destroy enemies and survive waves.
controls: Arrow Keys: Navigate/Select towers and positions | Space: Place/Upgrade tower | Z: Cancel selection | Shift: Speed up (hold) | Enter: Start game | ESC: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart

title: A Few Quick Matches
description: A fast-paced stick figure platform fighter. Master combos and dash-cancels to defeat opponents by health depletion or ring-out.
controls:
Controls: ARROWS to Move • SPACE to Jump (x2) • Z to Attack (ARROWS + Z for Directional: Up, Down, Forward, Back) • SHIFT to Dash
 Tips: Hit an enemy to enable Dash-Cancel!

title: Untitled Game
description: Navigate 9 levels to reach the exit. Defeat all enemies to unlock the exit and buy weapons from the shop.
controls: Arrow Keys/WASD: Move | Space: Shoot | E: Interact | H: Heal (100 gold) | S: Shop | Enter: Start | Esc: Pause | R: Restart

title: Aether Arena: Rivals of the Abyss
description: Embody the Fire Lion in this platform fighter. Battle endless shadow minions, knocking them off stage with elemental attacks and specials to survive the Abyss.
controls: Arrows: Move | Space: Jump | Z: Attack | Shift: Special | ESC: Pause | R: Restart

title: Untitled Game
description: Escape the haunted mansion while evading the terrifying. Navigate 6 challenging levels, find keys, solve puzzles, and stay hidden to survive. Complete all levels to win!
controls: Arrow Keys: HOLD to move player continuously | Shift (Tap): Toggle sprint mode for faster movement | Space: Interact with doors, items, hiding spots | Z: Toggle flashlight (in dark levels) | Enter: Start game from title screen | Escape: Pause/Unpause game | R: Restart (returns to title screen)

title: Arena Reckoning: Pixel Horde
description: A top-down survival auto-battler. Battle endless monster waves, focusing on movement and strategic upgrades. Collect EXP to level up and defeat bosses across challenging levels.
controls: Arrow Keys / WASD: Move your character | Space: Confirm upgrade selection | Shift/ESC: Pause/Unpause game | Enter: Start game from main menu | R: Restart and return to main menu

title: Untitled Game
description: Eliminate enemies, earn XP for upgrades, and survive waves to reach level 5 and win the match in this arena FPS.
controls: Arrow Keys: HOLD to move/aim continuously (UP/DOWN to move, LEFT/RIGHT to aim) | Space: TAP to shoot weapon | Shift (hold): Sprint mode (faster movement) | Z: TAP to reload weapon | Enter: Start game | Esc: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart to main menu

title: Blades of Brim Clone
description: Save Brim! Run, jump, and attack through endless lanes, dodging obstacles and slaying Goons. Collect coins to survive and achieve the highest score.
controls: Left Arrow / A: Move Left Lane | Right Arrow / D: Move Right Lane | Up Arrow / W: Jump | Down Arrow / S: Roll / Slide | Space: Attack / Slash | ENTER: Start Game | ESC: Pause / Resume | R: Restart (Game Over screen)

title: BLUE REVOLVER: SYSTEM_BREACH
description: A high-speed vertical shoot-em-up. Pilot Mae's avatar to breach the Blue Revolver mainframe, survive security, and destroy core systems.
controls: ARROWS: Move | SPACE: Shoot | SHIFT: Focus | Z: Special | ENTER: Start

title: Bounce & Collect
description: Drop balls through pegs, hit multiplier gates to duplicate them, and land in bins for points. Reach the target score to complete levels.
controls:
LEFT ARROW: Move drop position left
 RIGHT ARROW: Move drop position right
 SPACE: Drop ball at current position
 ENTER: Start game from start screen
 ESC: Pause/Unpause game
 R: Restart game (from game over screen)

title: Cannon Shot
description: Position ramps and deflectors to guide cannon balls into buckets. Use limited balls to fill all buckets and win each level!
controls:
Controls:
 Arrow Keys (←→): Select object (when not grabbed)
 Space: Pick up/drop object (toggle grab mode)
 Arrow Keys (↑↓←→): Move grabbed object position
 A/D: Rotate grabbed object
 Enter: Start game from menu
 Esc: Pause/unpause game
 R: Restart from game over screen
 Z: Fire cannon (when in playing phase and not editing)

title: Untitled Game
description: You are an amorphous creature, trapped in a facility. Consume humans to grow, evolve abilities, and eliminate all personnel to escape.
controls: Arrow Keys: Move | Space: Lunge Attack | Shift: Tentacles (Large) | Z: Blood Trail (Medium+) | Enter: Start | ESC: Pause | R: Restart

title: Untitled Game
description: Jump, dash, and wall climb through challenging platforming levels, avoiding spikes and collecting strawberries to reach the summit.
controls: Arrow Keys: Move left/right, climb up/down on walls | Space: Jump (press again in air for double jump) | Z: Air dash in the direction you're moving (limited uses, recharges on landing) | Enter: Start game | ESC: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart to main menu

title: Untitled Game
description: Collect all cheese to activate the mouse hole and escape each level. Avoid patrolling cats. Complete all levels for victory.
controls: Arrow Left: Move left | Arrow Right: Move right | Arrow Up: Jump (when on ground) | ENTER: Start game | ESC: Pause/Unpause game | R: Return to start screen

title: Chromatic Ascent
description: Guide your bouncing orb through rotating puzzles. Match its color to pass obstacles; touching a different color is fatal. Collect stars and Color Changers as you climb.
controls: SPACE: Jump | ARROWS: Move | ESC: Pause | R: Restart

title: Color Road 3D
description: Roll your ball on an endless road. Match its color with other balls to collect points, but avoid different colors to prevent crashing. Use ramps to change color and jump.
controls: Controls: Arrow Keys to Move/Speed • ENTER to Start • ESC to Pause

title: Untitled Game
description: Connect adjacent dots of the same color to clear them. Form squares to clear all dots of that color. Complete objectives before moves run out.
controls: TAP-BASED CONTROLS: Arrow Keys: Single tap moves cursor one cell | Space: Tap once to start path, move with arrows to build, tap again to execute | Shift: Cancel current path | Enter: Start game | Escape: Pause/unpause | R: Return to main menu

title: Untitled Game
description: Click the cookie to earn cookies, then buy buildings and upgrades to automate production. Reach 10,000 cookies to win!
controls: Controls: SPACE: Click cookie | Arrow UP/DOWN: Navigate menu | Z: Purchase | SHIFT: Toggle tabs | ENTER: Start | ESC: Pause | R: Restart

title: Crypt of the Rhythm Knight
description: A rhythmic dungeon crawler. As a knight, synchronize moves and attacks to the beat to escape, defeat foes, and collect treasures. Miss a beat, stumble, and lose your combo!
controls:
- Arrow Keys: Move character / Attack adjacent enemies (must be on beat!)
- Space: Skip a beat (stay in place)
- Enter: Start Game
- Esc: Pause / Unpause
- R: Restart Game (from Game Over or Win screen)

title: Untitled Game
description: Hit falling musical notes with precise timing to grow a mystical tree. Master tap, hold, and swipe notes, build combos, and unlock new songs.
controls: Controls: Arrow Keys (←→): Move between lanes | Space: Hit Red/Green notes | Z: Hit Yellow notes | Enter: Start | Esc: Pause | R: Restart

title: Doodle Hopper
description: Jump through evolving worlds in this vertical platformer. Bounce off platforms, avoid monsters, and collect stars to ascend higher.
controls:
- Arrow Left / Arrow Right: Move the character horizontally.
- Space: Shoot projectiles upwards to defeat monsters.
- Enter: Start the game from the main menu.
- P or Esc: Pause and unpause the game.
- R: Restart the game when game over.

title: Downwell-ish
description: Descend a monster-filled well using Gunboots to shoot enemies, slow your fall, and collect gems. Ammo recharges on platforms. Reach the bottom alive!
controls: ARROWS: Move | SPACE: Jump/Shoot | ENTER: Start | R: Restart

title: Easy Delivery Co.
description: Drive your kei truck to pick up and deliver packages in the foggy town of Oakhaven. Earn money, navigate the roads, and watch for strange occurrences in the mist.
controls:
- Arrow Up / W: Accelerate
- Arrow Down / S: Brake / Reverse
- Arrow Left / A: Steer Left
- Arrow Right / D: Steer Right
- Space: Handbrake / Interact (Pick up or Deliver package when in zone)
- Shift: Boost (uses fuel)
- C: Change Camera View (Follow / Cockpit / Top-down)
- H: Honk Horn
- ESC: Pause Game
- R: Restart (only on Game Over screen)

title: Endless Slayer
description: Slay endless waves of monsters in this fast-paced action RPG. Choose your hero, level up, and survive as long as you can!
controls:
- Arrow Left/Right: Move character / Select Class in menu
- Space: Jump
- Z: Attack (Sword / Shoot / Dash)
- Enter: Start Game / Confirm Selection
- Esc: Pause Game
- R: Restart Game (from Game Over screen)

title: Flappy Dunk Clone
description: Flap a winged basketball through hoops to score. Tap to gain altitude. Avoid the ground!
controls: Space / Arrow Up / Z / W / Click: Flap (Jump up) | Enter: Start Game | R: Restart Game | ESC: Pause / Resume

title: Untitled Game
description: Connect all glowing dots on the grid by drawing a continuous path. Visit every connection exactly once to solve puzzles and progress through levels.
controls: Arrow Keys: Navigate between dots | Space: Select/confirm dot and draw connection | Shift: Undo last connection | Z: Reset current puzzle | Enter: Start game | Esc: Pause/unpause | R: Return to start screen

title: Helix Jump 3D
description: Guide a bouncing ball down a rotating helical tower by navigating gaps. Avoid red zones to reach the bottom and set a high score.
controls:
- Arrow Left / A: Rotate tower left
- Arrow Right / D: Rotate tower right
- ENTER: Start game
- ESC: Pause / Resume
- R: Restart game (after game over)

title: Untitled Game
description: Command 3 Heroes in tactical turn-based combat across 5 levels. Master the elemental system (Fire > Nature > Water > Fire) to strategically defeat Villains, progress, and achieve a high score.
controls: TAP-BASED Controls (VLM Compatible): All controls use single key taps, no holding required. Arrow Left/Right: Select Hero or Target | Arrow Up/Down: Select Ability | Space: Confirm | Z: Cancel | Shift: End Turn | Enter: Start | Escape: Pause | R: Restart

title: Jelly Jump 3D
description: Control a bouncy jelly cube, jumping higher to escape the rising liquid. Time your jumps to land on closing platforms and collect blobs for score.
controls:
- Space / Up Arrow: Jump (Hold to jump higher)
- Left / Right Arrow: Move sideways (to collect items)
- Enter: Start Game
- R: Restart Game (when Game Over)
- Esc: Pause / Unpause

title: Jelly Shift 3D
description: Navigate an infinite obstacle course as a shapeshifting jelly block. Change your height and width to fit through gates, collect gems, and avoid crashing.
controls: Up Arrow / W: Shift Up (Become Tall & Thin) | Down Arrow / S: Shift Down (Become Short & Wide) | ENTER: Start Game | ESC: Pause / Unpause | R: Restart (after Game Over)

title: Jetpack Joyride Clone
description: Pilot Barry's jetpack through a dangerous, endless lab. Fly as far as possible, collecting coins, avoiding obstacles, and using vehicle tokens for protection.
controls: SPACE or ARROW UP: Activate Jetpack (Fly Up) / Flap Wings (Dragon Mode) | ESC: Pause / Unpause Game | ENTER: Start Game | R: Restart Game (on Game Over screen) | Z: Activate special vehicle ability (if equipped)

title: Jump King Legend
description: Ascend a colossal tower as a knight. Charge precise jumps between platforms, but with no air control, a single misstep means a long fall. Precision is paramount.
controls: ARROWS: Move | SPACE: Charge Jump | R: Restart | ESC: Pause

title: Kart Tour 3D
description: High-speed arcade racing on procedurally generated tracks. Drift, use power-ups, and beat AI opponents across 3 laps to win the Gold Cup.
controls: Arrow Up / W: Accelerate | Arrow Down / S: Brake / Reverse | Arrow Left / A: Steer Left | Arrow Right / D: Steer Right | Space: Use Item / Horn | Shift: Drift (Hold while turning for tighter turns) | Enter: Start Game | Esc: Pause Game | R: Restart Game (from Game Over screen)

title: Kero Blaster: Reboot
description: As Kero, clear glitch bugs from C&F Inc.'s server rooms. Jump, shoot, and reboot the teleporter system!
controls: ARROWS: Move/Aim | Z: Shoot | SPACE: Jump | SHIFT: Weapon | ENTER: Start | R: Restart

title: Kingdom Crashers
description: A 2D beat 'em up where you play as a knight defending the kingdom from barbarians. Battle enemies with sword and shield, mastering combat to defeat the Barbarian King and restore peace.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move character (Left/Right to run, Up/Down for depth)
Space: Jump
Z: Attack (Mash for combo)
Shift: Block / Shield
Enter: Start Game
Esc: Pause / Resume
R: Restart (on Game Over)

title: Knife Master Challenge
description: Master precision! Throw knives into rotating logs, avoid existing knives and obstacles, slice apples for bonuses, and defeat bosses.
controls:
- **Space** or **Z**: Throw Knife
- **Enter**: Start Game
- **Esc**: Pause / Unpause
- **R**: Restart Game (from Game Over screen)

title: Leap Day Clone
description: Climb a daily generated tower in this vertical platformer. Wall-jump, double-jump, dodge hazards, collect fruit, and reach the gold trophy at the summit. Checkpoints save progress.
controls: ARROWS: Move | SPACE: Jump / Double Jump | ENTER: Start | R: Restart

title: Logic Is You
description: A puzzle game where you change the rules by manipulating word blocks. Guide 'YOU' to 'WIN'.
controls: Arrow Keys: Move your character (the object defined as "YOU") and push blocks. | Z: Undo the last move. | R: Restart the current level. | Space: Skip to next level (debug/cheat). | ESC: Pause the game. | Enter: Start game from title screen.

title: Untitled Game
description: An alien girl uses love to defeat bullet-hell bosses. Collect power-ups to strengthen her heart, conquer stages, and face The Void.
controls: Arrow Keys: Move your heart around the arena | Z Key: Fire love projectiles at enemies | Shift Key: Focus mode (slower movement, shows hitbox) | Space Key: Use special ability (if unlocked) | ENTER: Start game from title screen | ESC: Pause/Unpause during gameplay | R: Restart game (from game over screen)

title: MAGICUS - Match-3 RPG
description: A Match-3 RPG. Match elemental runes to cast spells, defeat monsters, and clear stages to win. Lose if your HP drops to zero.
controls: Arrow Keys: Move the cursor on the grid | Z: Select a rune to swap / Confirm swap | Space: Cast Ultimate Spell (when Mana is full) | Shift: View Rune info (hold) | ESC: Pause the game | ENTER: Start the game | R: Restart the game (from Game Over screens)

title: Mini Golf Madness
description: Navigate challenging mini golf courses, avoiding hazards. Sink the ball in as few strokes as possible across 9 holes to win!
controls: Arrow Keys: Aim your shot (rotate the power indicator) | Space: Hold to charge power, release to shoot | Shift: Toggle camera zoom (when ball is moving) | Z: Quick restart current hole

title: Nano Transit
description: Design a transit map for a growing city. Connect stations with colored lines to transport passengers. Avoid overcrowding stations to keep the city moving.
controls: Arrows: Move Cursor | Z: Switch Line | Space: Connect/Build | Shift+Space: Undo | ESC: Pause

title: Neon Brick Breaker
description: Aim and fire balls to break descending neon bricks. Collect '+' items to increase your ball count. Don't let the bricks reach the bottom!
controls: ARROWS: Aim | SPACE: Fire | Z: Fast Forward | ESC: Pause | R: Restart

title: Neon Hop
description: Steer a glowing ball across a neon tile path. Bounce on tiles, avoid falling, and collect crystals for points. Survive as long as you can!
controls: Arrow Left / A: Steer Left | Arrow Right / D: Steer Right | Space: Boost Jump (Mid-air only) | Enter: Start Game | R: Restart Game | Esc: Pause/Resume

title: Neon Snake Breaker
description: Guide your snake of balls through a neon corridor. Break numbered blocks to progress, losing length equal to the block's value. Collect balls to grow and use Fever for an invincible dash.
controls: Controls: Left/Right to Move | Shift to Dash | Z for Fever | ESC Pause | R Restart

title: Untitled Game
description: An arcade shooter. Control a powerful cannon to defend against waves of sea creatures. Hunt fish across levels, earn points, and reach target scores before time runs out.
controls:
Arrow Left (←): Rotate cannon counter-clockwise
Arrow Right (→): Rotate cannon clockwise
Space: Fire projectile
ENTER: Start game from menu
ESC: Pause/Unpause during gameplay
R: Return to menu from game over screen

title: Octagon 1: Maximal Challenge
description: Navigate a high-speed octagonal tunnel. Rotate the tunnel and flip gravity to avoid procedurally generated obstacles and survive for 60 seconds.
controls:
- **ENTER**: Start Game / Confirm
- **ESC**: Pause / Unpause
- **R**: Restart Game (from Game Over or Pause)
- **Left Arrow**: Rotate Tunnel Left (Counter-Clockwise)
- **Right Arrow**: Rotate Tunnel Right (Clockwise)
- **Space**: Flip Gravity (Jump between Floor and Ceiling)
- **Z**: Turbo Boost (Hold to increase game speed for higher score risk/reward)

title: Untitled Game
description: Navigate an infinite octagonal tunnel, rotating to avoid obstacles. Survive 60 seconds to win, or achieve the highest score. Speed and complexity increase with progress.
controls: Controls: Left Arrow: Move to left lane | Right Arrow: Move to right lane | Space: Move across to opposite lane | Enter: Start game / Continue | Esc: Pause/unpause | R: Restart

title: OneBit Dungeon
description: A turn-based roguelike RPG. Explore dungeons, battle monsters, collect gold, and descend as deep as you can. Enemies move when you move.
controls: ARROWS: Move/Attack | SPACE: Wait/Stairs | Z: Potion | ENTER: Start | R: Restart | ESC: Pause

title: Pico Squad
description:
A puzzle-platformer where you control three characters simultaneously.
 Collect the key and guide all squad members to the exit.
 Coordinate movement, stack, and push blocks to overcome obstacles; lose one, lose all!
controls:
- Arrow Left / Arrow Right: Move the entire squad horizontally
- Space: Make the entire squad jump
- Z: Regroup (Apply magnetic force to bring squad members closer together)
- Shift: Precision Mode (Move slower for careful positioning)
- Enter: Start Game / Next Level
- Escape: Pause / Unpause Game
- R: Restart the current level

title: Untitled Game
description: Race through challenging tracks in this top-down arcade racer! Avoid obstacles, master drifting, and upgrade your car to defeat the ultimate boss, The Enforcer.
controls:
CONTROLS:
Arrow Up / W: HOLD to Accelerate Continuously
Arrow Left / A: TAP to Move Left One Lane
Arrow Right / D: TAP to Move Right One Lane
Space: HOLD to Brake
Enter: Start Game
Esc: Pause / Unpause
R: Restart (return to start screen)
Note: Hold acceleration for continuous speed boost. Tap left/right for discrete lane changes!

title: Pixel Hopper
description: Hop through an endless world of roads, rivers, and train tracks. Avoid obstacles, balance on logs, and keep moving to score points.
controls: ARROWS: Move | ENTER: Start | ESC: Pause | R: Restart

title: Plants vs Zombies - Tower Defense
description: Defend your lawn from zombie waves! Plant unique units using sun to stop them before they reach your house. Strategize plant placement and resource management to win each wave.
controls: Arrow Keys (↑↓←→): Move plant placement cursor on lawn | Z: Switch plant selection | C: Collect falling sun (when near cursor) | Space: Place selected plant at cursor position | Shift+Space: Dig up plant | Enter: Start game from title screen | ESC: Pause/unpause game | R: Restart game (from game over screen)

title: Pogo Punk 3D
description: In a dystopian future where walking is banned, pogo your way to freedom. Master physics to bounce over obstacles, maintain balance, and reach the goal. Collect batteries for score.
controls:
- **ENTER**: Start Game
- **Arrow Left / A**: Tilt Left (lean back/brake)
- **Arrow Right / D**: Tilt Right (lean forward/accelerate)
- **Space**: Charge Jump (hold to bounce higher)
- **ESC**: Pause / Resume
- **R**: Restart (after Game Over)

title: Untitled Game
description: Pocket all colored balls using the cue ball to clear the table. Aim, adjust power, and avoid fouls like scratching. Master your pool skills across 9 challenging levels!
controls:
Arrow Left/Right: Rotate cue stick to aim (hold for continuous)
Arrow Up/Down: Adjust shot power (hold for continuous)
Shift + Arrow Keys: Apply spin (Up=top, Down=back, Left/Right=side)
Space: Execute shot
Z: Confirm cue ball placement (after foul)
Enter: Start game
Escape: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

title: Untitled Game
description: A strategic tower defense game. Build monkey towers to pop waves of balloons, earn money, and upgrade defenses. Survive all waves to win!
controls: Arrow Keys: Move the construction cursor across the map. | Z: Cycle through available tower types to build. | Space: Build the selected tower at cursor position (if valid) OR Select/Deselect an existing tower. | Shift: Upgrade the currently selected tower (if enough money). | Enter: Start the next wave (only when no wave is active) / Start Game. | ESC: Pause or Unpause the game. | R: Restart the game (only on Game Over screens).

title: Red Dungeon
description: Trapped in an endless, shifting dungeon, escape the closing 'Wall of Doom'. Navigate the grid, avoid traps, and collect gold for points.
controls: Controls: Arrows to Move, Space to Wait, ESC to Pause, R to Restart

title: RED HOT VENGEANCE - Web Edition
description:
RED HOT VENGEANCE is a top-down tactical shooter.
 Play as a hitman seeking revenge, clearing procedural levels of hostile mobsters.
 Utilize cover, manage ammo, and wield diverse weapons to eliminate all enemies and progress.
controls:
- WASD: Move Character
- Arrow Keys: Shoot (Up, Down, Left, Right - hold two for diagonals)
- Space: Dash / Dodge Roll (Invulnerability frames)
- Z: Swap Weapon (if multiple available)
- Shift: Walk (Slow movement for precision)
- Enter: Start Game / Next Level
- Esc: Pause / Resume
- R: Restart Game (from Game Over screen)

title: Untitled Game
description: Hit musical notes with perfect timing using arrow keys to score points, build combos, and charge special abilities. Collect Elfins for multipliers. Avoid enemies and excessive misses to win!
controls: Left Arrow: Hit notes in upper lane | Right Arrow: Hit notes in lower lane | Arrow Keys (Up/Down): Switch between upper and lower lanes | Shift: Activate special ability (when meter is full) | Enter: Start game from start screen | Esc: Pause/Unpause game | R: Return to start screen from game over

title: Ridiculous Fishing - p5.js
description: Cast your line deep, dodging fish on descent. Reel them in on the ascent, then fling and shoot your catch to earn cash. Upgrade your gear to explore greater depths!
controls:
Arrow Left/Right: Steer Hook (Descent/Ascent) / Aim Weapon (Shooting) / Select Upgrade (Shop)
Space: Shoot Weapon (Shooting)
Z: Buy Upgrade (Shop)
Enter: Start Game / Cast Line (Shop) / Continue (Summary)
Esc: Pause / Unpause
R: Restart Game

title: Untitled Game
description: A dungeon exploration and base management RPG. Build your base, recruit heroes, and use tactical combat to conquer dungeons. Reach Zone 3's Arena for victory!
controls: Arrow Keys: Navigate menus and move party in dungeons | Space: Select/Confirm actions in menus and base management | Z: Use hero abilities in combat (cycles through party members) | Shift: Speed up resource collection and combat animations | Enter: Start game from title screen | ESC: Pause/Unpause game | R: Restart game (return to title screen)

title: Untitled Game
description: A 2D action RPG. As a shadow ninja, fight through levels, upgrade skills, and defeat the Shadow Lord to save the realm.
controls: Arrow Left/Right: Move character | Space / Arrow Up: Jump | Arrow Up/Down: Climb ladders | Arrow Down + Space: Drop through thin platforms | Z: Attack (Melee) | Shift: Dodge / Dash | Down + Z: Special Skill 1 (Ground Smash) | Up + Z: Special Skill 2 (Rising Strike) | ESC: Pause Game | R: Restart Game (from Game Over/Win screens) | ENTER: Start Game

title: Untitled Game
description: Guide a young boy through a dark, puzzle-filled world to find his lost sister. Overcome traps and platforming challenges; death is part of learning. Reach the final checkpoint.
controls: Arrow Left/Right: Move left or right | Arrow Up/Space: Jump | Z Key: Interact (push/pull crates, activate levers, grab ropes) | Enter: Start game | Esc: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart to main menu

title: Untitled Game
description: As a ninja assassin, infiltrate enemy territory. Eliminate all red primary targets while avoiding detection by guards. Use stealth, vents, and barrels to complete your mission silently.
controls: Arrow Keys: HOLD to move ninja continuously (Up/Down/Left/Right) | Space: TAP for context action - Silent takedown (near enemy) / Use vent (on vent) / Detonate barrel (near barrel) | Enter: Start game from main menu | ESC: Pause/Unpause game | R: Restart (return to main menu)

title: Untitled Game
description: Run a shawarma restaurant, fulfilling customer orders quickly and accurately. Add exact ingredients, then serve. Earn points and maintain reputation across 5 levels to become a Shawarma Legend!
controls: Arrow Keys: Navigate menus and select sauces (Up: Garlic Sauce, Down: Tahini Sauce) | Z: Add Meat | Space: Serve Order | ENTER: Start Game / Confirm | ESC: Pause / Unpause | R: Restart (from Game Over screen) | Shift: Quick pause toggle during gameplay

title: Untitled Game
description: Guide your snake, eating pellets and defeating AI to grow longer. Avoid collisions and use boost (costs mass) to reach target length and advance levels.
controls: Arrow Left/Right: Turn your snake left or right | Space or Shift: Activate speed boost (costs mass) | Enter: Start game or confirm menu selections | Escape: Pause/unpause game | R: Return to main menu from game over screen

title: Untitled Game
description: Fight waves of vegetable enemies as a potato survivor. Auto-fire your weapon, level up with experience, buy upgrades with materials, and defeat the final boss across 3 levels. Become the ultimate survivor!
controls: W: Move Up | A: Move Left | S: Move Down | D: Move Right | Shift: Dash (quick speed boost with cooldown) | Space: Confirm selection in menus | Enter: Start game from menu | Escape: Pause/Unpause game | R: Restart (return to menu from game over)

title: Stack - Three.js Game
description: Build the tallest tower by precisely stacking sliding blocks. Overhangs are sliced, reducing your base. Miss the stack, and it's game over!
controls:
- SPACE: Place the moving block
- ENTER: Start the game from the menu
- ESC: Pause or Unpause the game
- R: Restart the game after Game Over

title: Star of Providence: Sector Zero
description: A fast-paced top-down shooter. Pilot your ship through procedurally generated sectors, battling foes and upgrading your weaponry. Clear 5 sectors to defeat the Guardian and secure the Providence Core.
controls: Arrow Keys: Move your ship. | Z: Fire weapon. | Space: Dash (evasive maneuver with temporary invulnerability). | Shift: Focus Mode (Slow movement, lock facing direction for precision strafing). | Enter: Start Game. | Esc: Pause / Unpause. | R: Restart Game (from Game Over screens).

title: Stickman Fury
description: A rhythm brawler. Defeat endless stickman ninjas by striking with precision as they enter your attack range. Master timing and combos to unleash fury.
controls: Controls: LEFT/RIGHT Arrows to Attack | SPACE for Fury | ESC to Pause

title: Untitled Game
description: Navigate an endless subway, dodging trains, jumping barriers, and sliding under obstacles across three tracks. Collect coins and power-ups to complete 5 challenging levels by reaching distance goals. Score increases with distance, coins, and level bonuses.
controls: Arrow Left/A: Move to left lane | Arrow Right/D: Move to right lane | Arrow Up/W: Jump over low obstacles | Arrow Down/S: Slide under high obstacles | Enter: Start game (from start screen) | ESC: Pause/Unpause game | R: Restart (return to start screen)

title: Subway Runner 3D
description: Race through the subway tunnels! Dodge trains, jump over barriers, and slide under obstacles. Collect coins to progress through 9 increasingly difficult levels. Watch out - you only have 3 lives!
controls: Arrow Left / A: Move Left | Arrow Right / D: Move Right | Arrow Up / W: Jump | Arrow Down / S: Slide | ESC: Pause | R: Restart

title: Untitled Game
description: Draw barriers to guide falling sugar into cups, filling each to its target. Use color filters, gravity switches, and teleporters to solve challenging puzzles.
controls:
SPACE: Place drawing points (place 2 points, then adjust curve)
 ARROW KEYS: Move cursor or adjust curve control point
 R: Reset current level
 ENTER: Start game from start screen
 ESC: Pause/Unpause game or cancel current drawing

title: Untitled Game
description: Match falling symbols by pressing the correct key. Complete 5 levels, avoiding misses. Build combos for a high score.
controls: W: Match Star (Yellow) | A: Match Circle (Red) | S: Match Square (Blue) | D: Match Triangle (Green) | ENTER: Start Game | ESC: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart to Menu

title: Untitled Game
description: Eliminate hostile enemies and protect innocent hostages across 5 levels. Use knives, exploding barrels, and stun boxes strategically.
controls: Arrow Left/Right: HOLD to smoothly rotate aiming direction | Space: Throw knife in aimed direction | Enter: Start game from menu | Esc: Pause/Unpause game | R: Restart and return to start screen

title: Tilt Roller
description: Tilt the world to guide the ball through 3D mazes. Reach the goal zone to advance to the next level. Be careful not to fall off the edges!
controls: ARROWS/WASD: Tilt Stage | SPACE: Brake | R: Restart | ESC: Pause | ENTER: Start

title: Timberman Clone
description: Chop an endless tree, dodging branches by moving to the opposite side. Each chop earns points and restores energy; run out of energy and the game ends. Stay quick!
controls: Left Arrow: Move to the Left side and Chop | Right Arrow: Move to the Right side and Chop | Enter: Start Game | R: Restart Game (from Game Over) | Esc: Pause / Unpause

title: Untitled Game
description: A rhythm game. Hit notes precisely as they reach the central target to score points, build combos, and maintain health. Complete songs to progress.
controls: Controls: Space: Hit blue circular notes | Z: Hit gold star notes | Shift: Hit purple circular notes | Enter: Start game | ESC: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart

title: Untitled Game
description: Defend your tower from zombie waves. Move to collect blocks and shoot enemies. Use blocks to upgrade your tower and survive three challenging levels.
controls: Move: Arrow Keys or A/D | Fire: SPACE (costs energy!) | Switch Direction: Q (left) / E (right) | Aim: UP/DOWN Arrows | Start: ENTER | Pause: ESC | Restart: R

title: Untitled Game
description: Slide vehicles to clear a path for the red bus to exit the grid. Each vehicle moves along its orientation. Solve challenging parking puzzles.
controls: Arrow Keys: Move cursor on grid | Space: Grab/release vehicle under cursor | Arrow Keys (while grabbed): Slide vehicle one space | R: Restart | ESC: Pause/Unpause | Enter: Start game

title: TUMBLE GUYS
description: A chaotic 3D obstacle course battle royale. Race as a colorful bean, navigating hazards to reach the finish line and claim your crown before qualification spots fill up!
controls: WASD: Move | SPACE: Jump | SHIFT: Dive | ENTER: Start | ESC: Pause | R: Restart

title: Twist Jump 3D
description: Control a ball rolling on a twisting path. Rotate the world to align platforms, jump gaps, and collect gems. Survive as speed increases!
controls:
- Arrow Left / A: Rotate the world left
- Arrow Right / D: Rotate the world right
- Space / Arrow Up / W: Jump
- Enter: Start the game
- R: Restart the game (after game over)
- Esc: Pause / Unpause

title: ULTRAKILL-LITE
description: A fast-paced FPS where blood is fuel. Heal by killing enemies to survive waves in procedural arenas. Master movement and build style to progress.
controls: W, A, S, D: Move Forward, Left, Backward, Right | Arrow Keys: Look / Aim Camera | Space: Jump | Shift: Dash (Directional) | Z: Fire Weapon | ESC: Pause / Unpause | R: Restart (when Game Over) | Enter: Start Game

title: Untitled Game
description: As a human in the monster-filled Underground, navigate encounters. Use a unique battle system to SPARE enemies through dialogue and dodging attacks, or FIGHT. Survive three encounters to escape.
controls: Controls: Arrow Keys: Move your SOUL (red heart) to dodge attacks in battle / Navigate menu options | Z Key: Confirm menu selection / Advance dialogue | Space: Quick dodge (short cooldown) | Enter: Start game from main menu | ESC: Pause/Unpause game | R: Return to start screen from game over

title: Untitled Goose Clone
description: Become a mischievous goose! Ruin the gardener's day by stealing items, setting pranks, and honking. Complete your tasks to win, but avoid the chasing gardener.
controls: Arrow Keys / WASD: Waddle (Move) | Shift (hold): Run | Space: HONK! (Startles the gardener) | Z: Grab / Drop item (Interact) | Enter: Start Game | Escape: Pause / Resume | R: Restart (Game Over screens)

title: Voxel Venture
description: A 2D survival sandbox. Explore, mine resources, build shelter, and dig deep to find the legendary Blue Core artifact.
controls: ARROWS: Move/Aim | SPACE: Jump | Z: Mine/Place/Attack | SHIFT: Cycle Items | ESC: Pause | R: Restart

title: VoxelCraft
description: A 3D open-world sandbox. Explore, build, and survive in a procedurally generated world by placing blocks and mining resources.
controls: Use WASD to Move, ARROWS to Look. Z to Place, SHIFT to Cycle Tool.

title: WebFishing Sim
description: Relax, explore an island, and cast your line to catch unique fish. Master reeling, fill your journal, earn coins, and seek the legendary Glitch Fish!
controls: Arrow Keys / WASD: Move your character | Space: Jump | Z: Cast Line / Hook / Reel In (Hold during mini-game) | Shift: Sprint | Enter: Start Game | Esc: Pause / Resume | R: Restart Game (from Game Over screen)

title: Untitled Game
description: Navigate a mystical creature across dimensional rifts to rescue spirits. Shift between Material and Energy Worlds to solve platforming puzzles, where each world has unique elements. Avoid hazards to succeed!
controls: Arrow Left/Right: Move horizontally | Space: Jump | Z: Shift between Material World and Energy World | Enter: Start game from start screen | ESC: Pause/Unpause game | R: Restart and return to start screen

title: Untitled Game
description: Battle enemy waves across 5 levels in a shrinking arena. Collect upgrades, survive the timer, and defeat all foes to become the apex predator.
controls: Arrow Keys: Move in 8 directions (Up, Down, Left, Right, and diagonals) | Space: Fire your weapon | Shift: Activate special ability (Dash forward) | Enter: Start game / Confirm menu selections | Esc: Pause / Unpause game | R: Restart (return to start screen)

title: Worms Zone - Hungry Snake Arena
description: Control a worm, eat food to grow, and eliminate opponents by making them crash. Survive to become the largest in the arena!
controls: Controls: Arrow Keys: Steer | Space: Speed Boost | Z: Magnet | ENTER: Start | ESC: Pause | R: Restart

title: ZigZag Infinity
description: A fast-paced isometric runner. Control a sphere, switch directions to stay on the procedurally generated wall, collect diamonds, and go as far as you can!
controls:
- SPACE, Arrow Keys, Z, or Shift: Switch direction (Zig / Zag)
- ENTER: Start game
- ESC: Pause / Resume
- R: Restart game (from Game Over screen)

title: 서울 2033: 후원자 (Seoul 2033: Supporter)
description: Navigate post-apocalyptic Seoul in 2033. Make critical choices to manage your Health, Stress, Money, and abilities (STR, INT, CHA). Survive daily events to unlock achievements and new story branches.
controls: Controls: ↑↓ Navigate choices | SPACE Select choice | Z Quick-select | ENTER Start | ESC Pause | R Restart
